title: More Food
description: This simple mod adds more food to the game, without breaking the vanilla experience.
body:
This simple mod adds more food to the game with their respective recipes, with the goal of adding more food variety to the game. The current version of the mod adds the following: -Baked bread
-Fried egg
-Cheese
-Toast
-Cheese sandwich
More food types will be added in future updates, along with their recipes.
